summary: Iteration 32 - Session Extras Feature Testing COMPLETE. All new features verified: Unified Calendar Manager API + Admin UI, Session Testimonials CRUD + Display, Session Questions CRUD + Reply functionality, Personal Sessions Shared Styles in Page Headers tab, Session Detail Page redesign with iris purple hero + golden particles + calendar + question form. One bug fixed (testimonial creation 500 error due to duplicate 'order' keyword).
critical_code_review_comments: BUGFIX APPLIED: session_extras.py line 34 - Fixed duplicate 'order' keyword error in create_session_testimonial()
SessionDetailPage.jsx: Hero has iris purple gradient (linear-gradient from #1a0e2e to #5b21b6)
SessionDetailPage.jsx: StarField component renders golden (#D4AF37) star particles in hero and booking section
SessionDetailPage.jsx: BookingCalendar uses unified calendar data from /api/session-extras/calendar
SessionDetailPage.jsx: QuestionForm component with 7 working days note and send button working
SessionDetailPage.jsx: Testimonials section appears when testimonials exist for session
SessionManagerTabs.jsx: SessionCalendarManager has quick actions (Block 1/2/3 weeks, Open Weekdays +1/2 months)
SessionManagerTabs.jsx: SessionTestimonialsManager has add form and Excel drag-drop upload
SessionManagerTabs.jsx: SessionQuestionsManager has reply functionality with email option
PageHeadersTab.jsx: 'PERSONAL SESSIONS — SHARED STYLES' section with 6 font controls visible
seed_data_creation: Created 1 testimonial for session 92e592c9-5885-4b59-81bf-794636d9f1aa (Sarah M.) to demonstrate testimonials section
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session extras features fully working. Unified calendar stored in session_calendar collection (id='global_calendar'). Session testimonials in session_testimonials. Session questions in session_questions with replied/reply fields. Email sending via Resend may fail silently if not configured (expected). Session detail page uses /api/session-extras/calendar for availability data. Session template styles stored at settings.page_heroes.session_template.

api_calendar.GET_calendar: PASS - Returns global calendar with time_slots, available_dates, min_advance_days, block_weekends

api_testimonials.GET_testimonials_by_session: PASS - Returns testimonials filtered by session_id

api_questions.POST_questions: PASS - Creates question with name, email, question, session_id
api_questions.PUT_questions_reply: PASS - Saves reply and sets replied=true

api_site_settings.update_session_template: PASS - Can update session template styles

admin_sessions_tab.quick_actions: PASS - Block 1/2/3 weeks, Open Weekdays buttons
admin_sessions_tab.testimonials_manager: PASS - Session Testimonials with Excel upload
admin_sessions_tab.questions_manager: PASS - Session Questions with reply functionality

admin_page_headers_tab.font_controls: PASS - All 6 controls visible (Session Title, Description, Duration/Type, Price, Testimonial Text, Question Form Labels)

session_detail_page.golden_particles: PASS - StarField component renders golden stars
session_detail_page.time_slots: PASS - Shows 4 time slots from calendar
session_detail_page.question_form: PASS - Form with 7 working days note, Send button
session_detail_page.form_submission: PASS - Shows thank you message after submit
session_detail_page.testimonials_section: PASS - Shows testimonials when they exist

bugfix_details.root_cause: SessionTestimonial(**data.dict(), order=count) caused duplicate keyword 'order' because SessionTestimonialCreate already has order field with default value 0
bugfix_details.fix_applied: Changed to data_dict = data.dict(); data_dict['order'] = count; obj = SessionTestimonial(**data_dict)
